A, title V, § 512(c)(2)116 Stat. 2537Dec. 2, 2002“The provisions of law repealed by paragraph (1) [repealing sections 328 to 333 of this title] shall continue to apply with respect to courts-martial convened in the National Guard not in Federal service before the date of the enactment of this Act [].”Dec. 2, 2002
